fields.description: The enrichment result key to read the value from.
fields.label: Source Key
fields.options:
company_name
description
logo
industry
primary_email
primary_phone
secondary_phone

fields.description: The fieldname on the target doctype to write the value to.
fields.label: Target Fieldname

fields.description: Fill if empty: only write when the field is blank. Always refresh: overwrite on every run (for fully enrichment-derived fields). Override defaults: write even when the current value is a known default (see Default Values).
fields.label: Write Policy
fields.options:
Fill if empty
Always refresh
Override defaults

fields.description: If the value names a missing linked record (e.g. a CRM Industry), create it. Opt-in only.
fields.label: Create Missing Link

fields.description: Newline-separated values treated as "unset" defaults that may be overwritten, in addition to a truly empty field.
fields.label: Default Values
